opinion.h4: OHIO EX REL. IAUS v. CARLTON ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 726. Decided April 20, 1959.
opinion.p: Irwin Greene and Walter L. Greene for appellant.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE STEWART took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
359 U.S. 312 McCANN v. NEW YORK. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 636, Misc. Decided April 20, 1959.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for certiorari, certiorari is denied.
